sizing_rule.note: Optimal position quantities in leveraged portfolios determined by optimal weightings along efficient frontier. Weighting ratios between systems remain constant regardless of leverage degree. Specific optimal_f, kelly_fraction, and max_drawdown_tolerance values not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Optimal position quantities in leveraged portfolios (such as futures systems) are determined by optimal weightings, where the ratios of weightings between different market systems remain constant along the efficient frontier regardless of leverage degree.
